svg.text: Each address belongs to one user; one user may have many addresses
Each product belongs to one category; one category has many products
Categories are self-referential: a parent category has many children
Each order is placed by one user
Each order ships to one address
Each order line item belongs to one order
Each order line item references one product
Each payment belongs to one order
Each review is written by one user
Each review is about one product
Each wishlist entry is owned by one user
Each wishlist entry references one product

g.text: Covers users, addresses, products, categories, orders, payments, reviews, and wishlists.
Login handle – must be globally unique
Optional display name shown in the storefront
Each row belongs to exactly one user
street, city, state, postal_code, country are all required for shipping
Master product record – variants are separate rows
Price stored in minor units (cents) to avoid floating-point issues
Current stock on hand; goes negative when oversold
Order lifecycle: pending, confirmed, shipped, delivered, cancelled, refunded
Total including tax and shipping, in cents
Each row is one product line inside an order
Snapshot the price at purchase time – products can change later
One payment attempt per row; an order may have multiple attempts
Customers can review any product they purchased
Prevent duplicate reviews by same user on same product
One wishlist entry per user-product pair
